T-thank goodness...! ...But this, what do we do...? How are we supposed to move such

This small gap probably won't fit a person... but food or a canteen might just make
it through! Hehe...! Good for you! With this, you can survive in there!
I see... thanks! I was just getting hungry, so this helps a lot!
Alright! Then I'll send some other stuff over too! Just wait, \n[1]! I'll go find
...Right, then I should........ head deeper in.

Well...it seems he'll call for people, but...it'll take a little time to gather

Alright, food problem solved! Can't help it if rescue is slow... Well, let's just
...I see, if this solves the food problem...! Hey, Onii-chan!

...Ugh. Still, where on earth am I supposed to sleep...?

Ow, ow, ow... Leaning against the wall to sleep is tough after all... I've done it
before too, but I just can't get used to it...
Heeey, good morning! Onii-chan! Are you okay? Is everything alright over there?
Ah, Elly...good morning! Yeah, I'm fine...! Don't worry!
That's good... Here...I made breakfast. Eat this and get your strength up!
Hehe...since it has to fit through this small hole. I couldn't send anything too

...Yeah, you're right. I'll go check... Thanks for the meal!

......No one's here. I thought I heard something, but maybe it was a dream...?
...I'm hungry. Elly doesn't seem to have come yet... She said she'd bring breakfast,
so I'll wait a little longer.
...... Hmm, I don't have a clock so I'm not sure... ...Isn't Elly kinda late?
Maybe something happened over there...? No, but if she's with Dario, the two of them
......Really? Is it okay to leave him alone with my sister?
Dario and Elly's relationship has been icy for ages. My sister hated him, and he was
always more obsessed with Mana than with her...
But apparently he got rejected by Mana a year ago... If he were to fall for someone
next...... In this village, the only young girl is pretty much Elly......
......Ugh. What is this, I have a really bad feeling...... I don't want to think
Dario would do something awful to Elly, but......
...Elly's behavior yesterday. No, not just yesterday... Thinking back, lately, Elly
has been...... ...Ever since Dario came back, that girl has been acting strange......
With me gone now, they're alone together in this deserted mine shaft... What is he
doing right now... ...Alone with a vulnerable girl────
Gah! ...There's no time to wait...! I should be able to get to the other side soon. I
have to hurry back to them...!
